broadCirculationRecovery.notableFinding: Surface wind restoring was the dominant circulation lever. Moisture-only nudges were weaker, and post-init nudgeParams edits do not affect _nudgeParamsRuntime without targeting the runtime clone or core defaults.

seasonalDurabilityRecovery.tradeoffNote: This package trades a small 30-day moisture-score regression for a materially better 90-day moisture partitioning baseline while preserving the circulation category.
